nodes.nodeTooltip: Adds component(s) to specified target actor(s).
Applies the specified tags on the output data.
Applies property overrides and executes functions on a target object.
Applies the scale of each point to its bounds and resets the scale.
Remove superfluous control points along the spline, such as those that are co-located or collinear.
Combines each point to share a singular bound extent.
Creates point data from a provided list of points.
Creates a 2D or 3D grid of points.
Generate points on the surface of a sphere.
Creates a (closed) 2d polygon per input.
Creates a surface data from a Polygon 2D data.

nodes.defaultNodeTitle: Data Table Row To Attribute Set

nodes.nodeTooltip: Extracts the tags on the data to an attribute set.
Creates duplicates of each point with optional transform offsets.
Exports selected attributes directly to a file in a specified format.
Filters points or the elements of an attribute set based on a second input of points, attribute sets, or a user-defined index range expression.
Return the 2D convex hull of a set of points on the XY plane.
Gathers multiple data in a single collection. Can also be used to order execution through the dependency-only pin.
Generates landscape height texture and grass maps on the GPU.
Generate a seed attribute
Returns the list of asset, with options (class, bp generated class, etc.) from a source - collection or folder.
Creates an attribute set with one entry per attribute on the input data.
Return the number of elements in the input data.
Gets a specific segment from the input.
Creates an attribute set with one entry per tag
Applies a new random seed from point input.
Offsets polygon to either make it larger or smaller, or open/close holes based on the offset quantity.
Finds the optimal path across the points of a given point cloud--should one exist--when provided a start and goal location, and a maximum jump distance between points. Can return a partial path.
Computes quantities from nearby neighbor points, such as average density, color, and position.
Converts point data to an attribute set with one entry per point and the same attributes.
Prints the result of an interpreted grammar.
Issues a specified message to the log, and optionally to the graph and/or screen.
Modify the position of a point within its bounds, while keeping its bounds the same.
Samples color of texture at each point.
Exports the input data to a PCG Data Asset.
Save the input texture to a UTexture2D asset (format is always BGRA8). Outputs a soft object path attribute for the saved texture. Note: This node is editor only.
Perform a 2D orthographic scene capture and write the result to a render target data. Can be costly, use with caution with runtime generation.
Splits each input point into two separate points and sets bounds based on the position and axis of the cut.
Separates input data by whether they have the specified attribute or not, or on the data attribute value.
Casts a line trace or collision shape sweep from provided points along a given direction returning the location of the impact.
Combine spatial data into a union of all inputs. Order of inputs is respected, beginning with the dynamic pin inputs.
Visualizes a selected attribute on screen at each point's transform.
Waits some time and/or frames. Not a node that should be used in production except in very special cases.
Waits until landscape is ready, then passes data downstream.
